feat.name: Leshy Familiar
feat.text: You call a minor spirit of nature into a plant body, creating a leshy companion to aid you in your spellcasting. You gain a familiar, which has your choice of either the plant or fungus familiar ability (page 212); this doesn’t count against your usual limit of familiar abilities (typically 2). The spirit you call has a more tenuous connection to its plant body than fully independent leshies, so it is Tiny in size like other familiars.

traits.name: Druid
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the druid class.
